inlineContent.text: Resource is the base class for all Godot-specific resource types, serving primarily as data containers. Since they inherit from
, resources are reference-counted and freed when no longer in use. They can also be nested within other resources, and saved on disk. Once loaded from disk, further attempts to load a resource by
s in a Godot project, is also a resource, uniquely capable of storing and instantiating the
s it contains as many times as desired.
In GDScript, resources can loaded from disk by their

In C#, resources will not be freed instantly after they are no longer in use. Instead, garbage collection will run periodically and will free resources that are no longer in use. This means that unused resources will linger on for a while before being removed.
This object emits the following signals:
